stemHtml: What issues may you experience during the take-off, if you were to pick up a new jet transport aircraft from a factory in Europe on a cold day?

options.a: A high V<sub>2</sub> giving good aircraft performance.
options.b: A low V<sub>R</sub> making an engine failure easier to handle.
options.c: A high V<sub>MCA</sub> which will make reaching acceleration altitude easier.
options.d: A high V<sub>MCG</sub> which may lead to controllability issues in the event of an aborted take-off.
